data.title: Talon.One launches Unified Incentives Protocol for loyalty and promotions in AI commerce, includes extensions for Google’s UCP.
data.description: In Berlin, Talon.One has introduced the Unified Incentives Protocol, enabling loyalty and promotional data to be machine-readable for AI agents. This launch includes extensions for Google's UCP, further advancing the integration of incentives into AI technologies.

data.title: A-LIGN's 2026 Compliance Benchmark Report highlights the need for new audit cycles in managing risk due to evolving regulations.
data.description: Today, A-LIGN, a prominent cybersecurity compliance provider based in Tampa, Florida, revealed results from its 2026 Compliance Benchmark study. The study highlights a continuous cycle of changing regulations and requirements that necessitate a fresh audit approach to effectively mitigate risks. This underlines the importance of adapting audit cycles to navigate the evolving regulatory landscape.

data.title: Diginex Limited names Lubomila Jordanova as CEO to fuel acquisitions and global growth amidst sustainability solutions - Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Diginex Limited (NASDAQ: DGNX) disclosed the appointment of Lubomila Jordanova as Chief Executive Officer, marking a significant development in the company's journey towards growth and expansion in Europe. Diginex is a prominent software provider aiding businesses and governments in handling sustainability, regulatory, and supply chain data. This move is expected to have a notable impact on the company's future endeavors as it solidifies its presence in the market.

data.title: Study shows decreased toxicant exposure from e-cigarettes & charcoal-free shisha devices, benefiting public health.
data.description: A recent research study conducted in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, has shown a significant decrease in secondhand toxicant exposure from both charcoal-free shisha devices and electronic vaping products. The study reported a noteworthy decrease in harmful substances present in the air when compared to traditional smoking methods. This finding emphasizes the potential health benefits of using these alternative smoking products. The results indicate a reduction in toxicant exposure that could help improve air quality and public health. This research sheds light on the effectiveness of transitioning to charcoal-free shisha and electronic vaping products for reducing secondhand smoke-related health risks.

data.title: IgniteData appoints Laura Hilty as Chief Strategy Officer and Joe Lengfellner as Chief Product Officer, aiming for real innovation in the digital health and clinical research industry.
data.description: IgniteData, a prominent player in intelligent clinical trial data automation, has revealed the addition of Laura Hilty as the Chief Strategy Officer, and Joe Lengfellner as the Chief Product Officer. Zach Taft, the CEO of IgniteData, emphasized that in the realms of digital health and clinical research, substantial progress requires not only advanced technology but also skilled leaders with the necessary vision and drive. This crucial development signifies a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: 2026 NAMM Show celebrates 125-year anniversary with historic gathering, demonstrating the future of global music industry.
data.description: In 2026, the NAMM Show celebrated its 125-year anniversary, showcasing why the global music community convenes annually at this event. Held in Carlsbad, California, the milestone event demonstrated the significance of NAMM (The National Association of Music Merchants), the leading global not-for-profit music trade organization.

data.title: Renewal Fuels, Inc. (OTC: RNWF), known as American Fusion, files patent and advances regulatory readiness.
data.description: Renewal Fuels, Inc., operating under the name American Fusion, has recently filed their first priority patent. This move signifies a significant step towards protecting their innovations. Additionally, the company has made substantial progress in readiness for core regulations. These advancements highlight the firm's commitment to securing its intellectual property and ensuring compliance with necessary regulations.

data.title: Centauri Health Solutions attains HITRUST r2 Certification, a top healthcare information security standard, with no CAPs.
data.description: Phoenix-based company Centauri Health Solutions has recently attained HITRUST Risk-based Certification, a prestigious information security certification in the healthcare sector. The certification, valid for 2 years, signifies Centauri's commitment to robust security measures and risk management practices. Noteworthy is the absence of Corrective Action Plans in the recertification process. This achievement demonstrates Centauri's dedication to maintaining high standards of data protection and security in the industry.

data.title: Amenify and Visa partner to launch new resident commerce framework, enabling tenants to earn rewards for rent and local spending.
data.description: Amenify Corporation, a prominent resident commerce and services platform based in San Francisco, revealed a recent partnership with Visa Inc., a global giant in digital payments. Through this collaboration, Amenify intends to introduce an innovative framework for resident commerce. This new initiative will empower tenants to accumulate benefits from rent payments and local expenditures, which can then be utilized to engage with tailored services, nearby businesses, and productivity tools seamlessly integrated into the housing environment.

data.title: Youlife Group Inc. partners with VCI Global Limited to launch Robotics-Enabled WaaS.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on January 28, 2026, Youlife Group Inc. (NASDAQ: YOUL), a prominent blue-collar lifetime service provider based in China, revealed its recent agreement. The company has signed a non-binding letter of intent indicating its plan to pursue a new venture.

data.title: McCann Systems chosen as AV Integrator for 113 Spring project, an innovative retail & wellness concept in SoHo.
data.description: In New York on January 28, 2026, McCann Systems was chosen as the AV Integrator for the 113 Spring venture. The project, located in SoHo, is a unique retail and wellness concept created by Snøhetta architecture studio. The initiative aims to overhaul the space into an immersive, technology-driven experience.

data.title: CraniUS Therapeutics secures $20M in Series B funding for NeuroPASS™ platform development to penetrate blood-brain barrier.
data.description: CraniUS Therapeutics LLC, a private neurotechnology company, recently disclosed that it has secured $20 million in Series B funding. This substantial amount is intended to expedite the advancement of NeuroPASS™, a groundbreaking project designed to enable direct therapeutic access beyond the blood-brain barrier.

data.title: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (AEM) agrees with Goldsky Resources Corp. on Barsele Project. News released on Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (NYSE: AEM, TSX: AEM) from Toronto shared today that its subsidiary, Agnico Sweden AB, and Goldsky Resources Corp. are collaborating. The news was released on January 28, 2026.

data.title: CMUH and partners develop brain-targeting exosome delivering curcumin for Parkinson's disease. Major breakthrough achieved.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Taichung, a significant advancement in exosome-based drug delivery was revealed by China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) led by Superintendent Dr. Cho Der-Yang. This breakthrough was accomplished through a partnership with Ever Supreme Bio Technology and Shine-On Biomedical.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $90,000 as Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin rise pre-FOMC meeting. Bitcoin ETFs: $147.4 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs: $63.5 million. Meme coins 3.5% rise to $45.2 billion. BTC $89,809, ETH $3,024, XRP $1.92, DOGE $0.1262, SHIB $0.057793.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is approaching $90,000 amidst increasing confidence in macro liquidity support. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $147.4 million in net outflows, while Ethereum ETFs saw $63.5 million in net outflows on Tuesday. The meme coin sector surged by 3.5% to reach $45.2 billion, reflecting the overall strength of the market. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin is at $89,809, Ethereum at $3,024, Solana at $127.12, XRP at $1.92, Dogecoin at $0.1262, and Shiba Inu at $0.05 7793. Analyst from Daan Crypto Trades stated that Bitcoin remains within its established range, with the yearly open serving as a key support level. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stack Capital Group Inc. invests $5 million USD in X-energy Reactor Company, an advanced nuclear tech company.
data.description: Stack Capital has disclosed an injection of $5 million USD into X-energy Reactor Company, LLC, a company specializing in advanced nuclear technology.
